title: Green Eyed Copper Golem
description: A simple resource pack that retextures the copper golem to have eyes similar to the new copper torches/ lanterns
body:
# **About**
This is a small Resource Pack that changes the Copper Golem's eyes to be green rather than yellow to put it's eyes more inline with the Copper Lanturn.

## Versions

- I have a version of the Copper Golem Eyes that use the origional Green color of the Copper Lanterns

- Alongside, a version that uses the Minty Green color of the New Copper Lanterns
